user_request: Find industrial design inspiration references for a travel-friendly manual coffee grinder with compact nesting geometry, knurled metal details, and premium tactile controls.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Clean, cylindrical, travel-oriented product with a technical industrial feel, dark ribbed body, and minimal contrasting metal details. Reads as practical and premium, with some modular compactness cues.
strengths: Compact vertical cylindrical silhouette suited to portable gear
Ribbed surface treatment adds grip and visual texture
Simple black-and-silver CMF feels modern and premium
Metal crank detail suggests mechanical tactility
weaknesses: Not clearly a manual coffee grinder at first glance; category cue is weak
Form is fairly generic and lacks distinctive nesting geometry
Knurled metal detailing is limited or not prominent enough
Top crank and side branding make it feel more like a branded accessory than an industrial design reference
Visual language is clean but not especially original
